title: Playwright Automation Engineer
summary: Path for QA professionals building maintainable Playwright and TypeScript automation.
objective: Build maintainable E2E automation with Playwright, TypeScript and CI evidence.
practical_project: Automate a critical journey with trace and Allure evidence.

title: Accessibility QA Specialist
summary: Learn WCAG-based testing combining automated axe checks and manual keyboard review.
objective: Execute WCAG 2.2 smoke and exploratory accessibility reviews.
practical_project: Audit five critical pages with axe + keyboard notes.

title: API and Contract Tester
summary: Master API functional tests and consumer-driven contracts for microservices.
objective: Validate APIs with Postman and introduce Pact contracts in CI.
practical_project: One Postman collection in CI plus one Pact consumer test.

title: Performance Testing Fundamentals
summary: Introduce load testing with k6 thresholds tied to SLOs.
objective: Run k6 load tests with pass/fail thresholds in staging.
practical_project: Load test top API with p95 latency threshold.

title: Security Testing for QA
summary: Coordinate with security using OWASP WSTG and ZAP baseline scans.
objective: Run scoped security smoke aligned to OWASP WSTG with ZAP triage.
practical_project: Weekly ZAP baseline on staging with triage notes.

title: Quality Engineering Lead
summary: Develop leadership skills linking DORA metrics, culture and test strategy.
objective: Align QA strategy with delivery metrics and coaching practices.
practical_project: Quarterly quality report with flake rate and CFR trends.

title: ISTQB Advanced Level Certification
summary: Structured preparation path for ISTQB Advanced Level (Test Manager, Test Analyst, or Technical Test Analyst) leveraging international standards tracked by QA Radar.
objective: Achieve ISTQB Advanced Level certification (Test Manager, Test Analyst, or Technical Test Analyst) by October 2026, grounding study in the international standards and practices already tracked in QA Radar.
required_skills: Familiarity with test management, test analysis, or test automation concepts
recommended_resources: ISO/IEC/IEEE 29119 — Software Testing standard (tracked in QA Radar Standards)
ISO/IEC 25059 — SQuaRE AI quality model (relevant for AI testing module)
Ministry of Testing — Advanced Test Automation discussions
suggested_practices: Map each syllabus section to a QA Radar standard or trend for real-world context
Use the structured exploratory testing and mutation testing techniques from QA Radar as practical examples
Apply AI governance standards (ISO 42001, EU AI Act) to the AI testing portions of the syllabus
Share learnings with the QA team via a walkthrough or written guide
practical_project: Prepare and deliver a team presentation connecting ISTQB Advanced Level concepts to the standards and practices tracked in QA Radar, with concrete examples from your IntelliQuip QA pipeline.
progress_evidence: Enrolled in ISTQB Advanced Level preparation course
Completed all course modules and practice exams
Scheduled and passed the ISTQB Advanced Level exam
Delivered team presentation on learnings and QA Radar connections
